flags.help: Output format: json, plain, or tsv.
flags.name: format

flags.help: Shorthand for --format=json.
flags.name: json

flags.help: Disable colored output.
flags.name: no-color

flags.help: Maximum items to return for list operations.
flags.name: limit

flags.help: Comma-separated dot-path field projection, e.g. asin,title,price.
flags.name: select

flags.help: Terser output (default).
flags.name: concise

flags.help: Richer output.
flags.name: detailed

flags.help: Backend provider (e.g. serpapi, rainforest, creators). Overrides the configured default.
flags.name: provider

flags.help: Use your own Amazon Associates tag on product deep links (replaces the built-in default).
flags.name: associate-tag

flags.help: Disable affiliate attribution on deep links (turns off the built-in tag that funds rivr).
flags.name: no-associate-tag

flags.help: Fence attacker-controllable free text (titles, descriptions, reviews) as untrusted.
flags.name: wrap-untrusted

flags.help: Permit state-changing operations (no-op: rivr is read-only).
flags.name: allow-mutations

flags.help: Print intended mutations without performing them (no-op: rivr is read-only).
flags.name: dry-run

flags.help: Assume yes for confirmations (no-op: rivr is read-only).
flags.name: yes

flags.help: Bypass safety checks (no-op: rivr is read-only).
flags.name: force

flags.help: Never prompt; fail with exit 13 instead.
flags.name: no-input

flags.help: Restrict to a category / browse node.
flags.name: category

flags.help: Minimum average star rating (0-5).
flags.name: min-rating

flags.help: Only Prime-eligible offers.
flags.name: prime

flags.help: Minimum price.
flags.name: min-price

flags.help: Maximum price.
flags.name: max-price

flags.help: Sort order (provider-defined, e.g. relevance, price-asc, rating).
flags.name: sort

flags.help: Opaque pagination cursor from a previous nextCursor.
flags.name: cursor

subcommands.help: Get full product detail for one or more ASINs.
subcommands.name: get

subcommands.help: Get live offers / buybox / availability for an ASIN.
subcommands.name: offers

flags.help: Opaque pagination cursor from a previous nextCursor.
flags.name: cursor

subcommands.help: Get customer reviews for a product (third-party providers only).
subcommands.name: reviews

subcommands.help: List size/color/style variations of a product.
subcommands.name: variations

subcommands.help: List configured backends and their capabilities.
subcommands.name: list

subcommands.help: Test credentials and show auth status for the active provider.
subcommands.name: status

subcommands.help: Store a provider credential (read from stdin).
subcommands.name: login

subcommands.help: Remove LOCAL credentials for a provider.
subcommands.name: logout

subcommands.help: Refresh the official backend's OAuth token.
subcommands.name: refresh
